Name: Aegis Gladius Dunlevy
Description:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Fighter 

Honor the famed Captain who shaped the course of the UEE Navy's elite fighter squadron with the Dunlevy variant for the Aegis Gladius. This special ship pays to tribute to Captain Alexandra Dunlevy and Squadron 42 with red highlights against a grey base paint and military-grade components.
